mapper.select: select count(*) from t_pm_approve where status = 'A' and curr_approver_user_id is not null and curr_approver_user_id like concat('%|',#{currentUserId},'|%') and enable_flg = true

select a.approve_no, p.process_code, c.deal_amount, c.cost_type from t_pm_process p join t_pm_approve a on p.id = a.process_id join t_apply_business_pay c on a.id = c.approve_id where p.enable_flg = true and a.enable_flg = true and c.status = 'D' and a.status = 'D' and p.process_code in ('APPLY_MANAGE_BUSINESS_PAY', 'APPLY_OPERATING_BUSINESS_PAY') and a.create_user_id = #{userId} and date_format(a.created_date, '%Y-%m') = #{ym}
